nasb.text: And it came about, when it had finished eating the vegetation of the land, that I said, “Lord God, please pardon! How can Jacob stand, For he is small?”

esv.text: When they had finished eating the grass of the land, I said, “O Lord God, please forgive! How can Jacob stand? He is so small!”

cnv.text: 蝗蟲吃盡地上的農產時，我說： “主耶和華啊！求你寬恕， 因雅各太弱小， 怎能站立得住呢？”

ccb.text: 蝗虫吃尽地上的青苗时，我说：“主耶和华啊，求你赦免！雅各那么弱小，他怎么受得了呢？”
